title: Abigail Sinks Her Teeth Into The Box Office With $10 Million Opening Weekend
text: The vampire horror film Abigail launched with approximately $10 million during its opening weekend, falling slightly short of earlier predictions of $12-15 million but outperforming its predecessor Ready or Not, which earned $8 million in its debut. The film earned $4 million on opening day, including $1 million from Thursday previews. Despite coming in second place behind Civil War, the movie is positioned to be profitable given its $28 million production budget. Industry observers note that Abigail may have cannibalized some audience interest from Civil War since both are R-rated films targeting adult viewers. The competition between these two releases highlights a crowded marketplace, as studios focus on adult-oriented content during the post-Easter period before summer blockbuster season begins.
